scenes.vo: Bayangkan jika mimpi manusia bisa direkam dan ditampilkan kembali layaknya film.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, a person waking up in a dark bedroom, soft morning light filtering through curtains, mysterious atmosphere with subtle fog, warm tones
scenes.video_prompt: slow camera push in, subtle breathing motion, curtains moving gently, cinematic lighting with lens flare

scenes.vo: Teknologi kini memungkinkan kita melihat apa yang terjadi di dalam otak manusia secara real-time.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, futuristic brain scan visualization, glowing neural pathways, dark background with holographic displays
scenes.video_prompt: camera orbit around brain, neural pathways light up sequentially, holographic display rotating

scenes.vo: Para ilmuwan mengembangkan alat yang bisa menerjemahkan sinyal otak menjadi gambar visual.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, scientist in lab coat looking at monitor showing brain imagery, high-tech laboratory environment
scenes.video_prompt: camera pan from scientist face to monitor, zoom into brain imagery on screen

scenes.vo: Setiap mimpi memiliki cerita yang unik dan penuh makna tersembunyi.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, dreamlike landscape with floating islands, aurora borealis sky, ethereal atmosphere
scenes.video_prompt: slow aerial pan across floating islands, aurora shifting colors, clouds drifting

scenes.vo: Dengan teknologi terbaru, kita bisa merekam dan menganalisis pola mimpi secara detail.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, advanced recording device attached to sleeping person, data streams flowing from head, futuristic bedroom
scenes.video_prompt: camera slowly zooms into the device, data streams pulse and flow, subtle glow effects

scenes.vo: Proses perekaman mimpi membutuhkan peralatan canggih dan algoritma AI yang kompleks.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, server room with blinking lights, AI neural network visualization on screens, cold blue lighting
scenes.video_prompt: camera moves through server racks, lights blinking, screens showing data processing

scenes.vo: Hasilnya adalah visualisasi mimpi yang menakjubkan dan penuh warna.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, colorful dream visualization on large screen, abstract art meeting reality, vibrant colors
scenes.video_prompt: colors morph and blend on screen, dream imagery transitions smoothly

scenes.vo: Namun, tidak semua mimpi terasa indah. Ada juga mimpi buruk yang menghantui.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, dark nightmare scene, shadowy figures in fog, red and black color palette, ominous atmosphere
scenes.video_prompt: shadows moving closer, fog thickening, red light pulsing ominously

scenes.vo: Teknologi ini membuka pintu ke dunia yang belum pernah kita jelajahi sebelumnya.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, person standing at edge of portal to another dimension, swirling cosmic energy, awe-inspiring scale
scenes.video_prompt: portal expanding, cosmic energy swirling, person stepping forward

scenes.vo: Masa depan perekaman mimpi sudah dimulai, dan kita adalah saksi sejarahnya.
scenes.image_prompt: cinematic realistic vertical frame, futuristic city skyline at sunset, people walking with dream recording devices, hopeful atmosphere
scenes.video_prompt: camera rises above city, sunset casting golden light, people walking with glowing devices
